tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
    My lover's got humour[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
She's the giggle at a funeral[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Knows everybody's disapproval[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
I should've worshipped her sooner[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
If the Heavens ever did speak[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
She is the last true mouthpiece[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Every Sunday's getting more bleak[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
A fresh poison each week[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]
'We were born sick,' you heard them say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
    My church offers no absolutes[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
She tells me 'worship in the bedroom'[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
The only heaven I'll be sent to[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Is when I'm alone with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]
I was born sick, but I love it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]
     Command me to be well[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]([ch]C/G[/ch])    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Aaaaaaaa-aaa    Aaa-men  Aaa-men  Aaa-men[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
      Take me to church, I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                                    [ch]G[/ch]
   I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Offer me that deathless death[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Good God, let me give you my life[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
      Take me to church, I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                                    [ch]G[/ch]
   I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Offer me that deathless death[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
Good God, let me give you my life[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
    If I'm a pagan of the good times[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
My lover's the sunlight[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
To keep the Goddess on my side[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
She demands a sacrifice[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C/G[/ch]
To drain the whole sea[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
Get something shiny[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Something meaty for the main course[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
That's a fine looking high horse[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
What you got in the stable?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
We've a lot of starving faithful[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]
That looks tasty[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]
That looks plenty[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
This is hungry work[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Take me to church, I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
   I'll tell you my sins so you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Offer my deathless death[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Good God, let me give you my life[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
      Take me to church, I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
   I'll tell you my sins so you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Offer me my deathless death[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
Good God, let me give you my life[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
   No masters or kings when the ritual begins[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
There is no sweeter innocence than our gentle sin[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
In the madness and soil of that sad earthly scene[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Only then I am human, only then I am clean[/tab]

[ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]G/C[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]([ch]G[/ch])    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Aaaaaaaaaaa-men  Aaa-men  Aaa-men[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
      Take me to church, I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                                    [ch]G[/ch]
   I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Offer me that deathless death[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Good God, let me give you my life[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
      Take me to church, I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                                                    [ch]G[/ch]
   I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Offer me that deathless death[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Good God, let me give you my life[/tab]
